meaning: adj.好交际的,友善的,增进友谊的,喜欢群居的
examples: She was, and remained, extremely sociable, enjoying dancing, golf, tennis, skating, and bicycling.
For sociable souls, meeting new people by staying in their homes is part of the charm.
I'm not feeling very sociable this evening.
Wiry, sociable, in his early thirties, he worked as an ecology officer for the municipality.
Her tireless efforts on behalf of what she calls "sociable bridge" have earned respect.
